name: The demon you summoned (you fucked up)
description:

Congratulations! To me! We hit 1600! (Definitely NOT late or anything) well I'm gonna be honest..My brain is not braining anymore, meaning I just don't have any ideas (for now) so it would be great if y'all Gave me some suggestions for bots..also happy spooky month!
